name: wg-easy
title: WireGuard Easy
description: Simplest way to run WireGuard VPN with a web-based management UI. Create clients, generate QR codes, and manage your VPN — all from the browser.

variables.name: WG_HOST
variables.label: Public Hostname/IP
variables.description: Your server's public IP or domain (clients connect to this)

variables.name: WG_PASSWORD_HASH
variables.label: Admin Password Hash
variables.description: bcrypt hash of admin password (generate with: docker run ghcr.io/wg-easy/wg-easy wgpw 'YOUR_PASSWORD')
